changes.description: Complete rewrite from generic RSS feed listing to procedural, task-specific skill. Added XML parsing scripts with bun -e examples, exact JSON output schemas for all 3 task types, topic assignment rules, date formatting rules, and multi-feed fetching procedure.

Fixed summarize-articles key_numbers shortfall (0.8→1.0). Increased minimum key_numbers from 8 to 10, added per-article example numbers to extract (fusion/chips/vehicles/batteries/remote work), emphasized writing summaries directly rather than via scripts, and clarified one_line_summary must be newly written not copied.
